name: flowcard-cli-workspace
description: Flowcard CLI — command-line access to the Flowcard API.

scripts.build:cli: npm run build -w @flowcard/shared && npm run build -w @flowcard/api-client && npm run build -w @flowcard/cli
scripts.check:cli: npm run check -w @flowcard/api-client && npm run check -w @flowcard/cli
